summary: Phase 38 (Content Audit + 10 new automation tests + bug fix) — FULLY VALIDATED. 8/8 backend pytest pass, frontend ContentAuditCard renders correctly between ReleaseGate and Run-nou, scan→empty-state works, filter dropdown all 5 values work without crash, synthetic conflict→AI-fix→apply→fixed lifecycle verified end-to-end through real Claude Sonnet 4.5 (~3s).

verified_acceptance_criteria.BACKEND_P0_execute_10_new: PASS — POST /api/admin/qa/automation/execute with the 10 new codes (key='test_codes') → summary.pass=10, fail=0 in ~2.3s.
verified_acceptance_criteria.BACKEND_P0_registry_24_tests: PASS — GET /api/admin/qa/automation/tests returns >=24 items, includes all DOC-AUDIT-01..05 and LIFECYCLE-01..05.
verified_acceptance_criteria.BACKEND_P0_scan_clean: PASS — POST /api/admin/qa/content-audit/scan returns {detected: 0, added: 0, already_existing: 0, total_scanned: 0} (escrow bug fixed).
verified_acceptance_criteria.BACKEND_P0_synthetic_conflict_lifecycle: PASS — Inserted synthetic conflict via motor; GET /conflicts returns it; POST /ai-fix returns title+body (Claude rewrote correctly, no error); POST /apply with {} returns ok:true; status moved to 'fixed'; override stored in db.doc_overrides; GET /api/admin/docs/specialist still returns 200; full cleanup verified.
verified_acceptance_criteria.BACKEND_P1_rbac_403: PASS — client login gets 403 on all 5 /admin/qa/content-audit/* endpoints (scan, conflicts GET, ai-fix, apply, status PATCH).
verified_acceptance_criteria.BACKEND_P1_pdf_regression: PASS — GET /api/admin/docs/specialist/pdf returns valid PDF (Content-Type application/pdf or %PDF- magic, >1KB).
verified_acceptance_criteria.BACKEND_P1_escrow_audience_correct: PASS — /api/admin/docs/specialist body NO LONGER contains 'banii pe care îi plătești', confirmed contains 'alimentează escrow' / 'ești plătit' / 'primești' (specialist perspective).
verified_acceptance_criteria.FRONTEND_P0_card_visible: PASS — qa-content-audit-card renders BETWEEN qa-release-gate-card and Run-nou/RunsList on /admin → QA Playbook landing.
verified_acceptance_criteria.FRONTEND_P0_scan_btn_empty_state: PASS — clicking qa-audit-scan-btn renders empty-state text '🎉 Niciun conflict deschis — documentația ta e curată!' (since scan finds 0 new conflicts).
verified_acceptance_criteria.FRONTEND_P0_filter_dropdown: PASS — qa-audit-filter dropdown has 5 options (ALL/open/approved/dismissed/fixed). Changing through every value keeps the card mounted, no crashes, no errors.

test_evidence.ai_fix_real_call: Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key — successfully returned valid JSON {title, body}
test_evidence.override_cleanup: doc_overrides delete_many({section_index:99, block_index:99, doc_slug:'specialist'}) executed in finally

critical_code_review_comments: qa_content_audit.py persist_conflicts: idempotency key includes only doc_slug::section::block but the find_one filter checks {key, status:{$in:['open','approved']}} — re-scanning after a conflict is dismissed/fixed will re-insert a duplicate. Consider checking ANY existing key instead, or normalising on key alone.
ai_suggest_fix: silently returns {error: 'EMERGENT_LLM_KEY missing'} if key absent — admin UI may not surface this clearly. Consider raising HTTPException(503) so frontend toast is consistent.
AdminQAPlaybook.jsx now at >800 lines including ContentAuditCard — same recommendation from iter 37: split per-card components into modules.
qa_content_audit._scan_text_for_audience uses 7-8 hardcoded Romanian phrases. Future: move to db.audit_rules so admins can tune without redeploy.

apply_fix: replace_one upsert on (doc_slug, section_index, block_index) — if two different conflicts target the same block, second apply silently overwrites first. Add log/warn when an existing override is being clobbered.
seed_data_creation: Two synthetic doc_conflicts inserted via motor inside pytest fixtures (test38xxxxxxxx, test38pxxxxxxxx). Both deleted in finally blocks. The 'fixed' conflict's override (section_index=99, block_index=99 on specialist) is also deleted. Lifecycle automation tests self-clean per problem statement. No residual data in db.doc_conflicts or db.doc_overrides at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 38 is COMPLETE and validated. The QA Playbook landing now has 3 cards (ReleaseGate → ContentAudit → RunsList/AutomationEngine). For automation execute API, request body schema is {test_codes: [...]} NOT {codes: [...]}. Filter dropdown uses value='ALL' (uppercase) for show-all. Real Claude Sonnet 4.5 is invoked on ai-fix (3-10s).
rca of the issue: Initial test failure was a test-script schema mismatch ({codes} vs {test_codes}); fixed in /app/backend/tests/test_phase38_content_audit.py. No production bugs found in Phase 38 implementation.
